      Replies the model change event associated to this figure event.

    • Uses of ModelObjectEvent in org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism

      Methods in org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism that return ModelObjectEvent 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      ModelObjectEvent ModelObject.fireComponentAdded(ModelObject component)
      Notifies the listener about the addition of a component in this model object.
      ModelObjectEvent AbstractModelObject.fireComponentAdded(ModelObject component)
      Notifies the listener about the addition of a component in this model object.
      ModelObjectEvent ModelObject.fireComponentRemoved(ModelObject component)
      Notifies the listener about the remove of a component in this model object.
      ModelObjectEvent AbstractModelObject.fireComponentRemoved(ModelObject component)
      Notifies the listener about the remove of a component in this model object.
      ModelObjectEvent ModelObject.fireContainerChanged(ModelObject oldContainer, ModelObject newContainer)
      Notifies the listener about the change of the container of this model object.
      ModelObjectEvent AbstractModelObject.fireContainerChanged(ModelObject oldContainer, ModelObject newContainer)
      Notifies the listener about the change of the container of this model object.
      ModelObjectEvent ModelObject.fireContentChanged(ModelObjectEvent cause)
      Notifies the listener about the change of the content of this model object.
      ModelObjectEvent AbstractModelObject.fireContentChanged(ModelObjectEvent cause)
      Notifies the listener about the change of the content of this model object.
      ModelObjectEvent ModelObject.fireLinkChanged(ModelObject oldLinkedObject, ModelObject newLinkedObject)
      Notifies the listener about the change of a link of this model object.
      ModelObjectEvent AbstractModelObject.fireLinkChanged(ModelObject oldLinkedObject, ModelObject newLinkedObject)
      Notifies the listener about the change of a link of this model object.
      ModelObjectEvent ModelObject.firePropertyChanged(String propertyName, Object oldValue, Object newValue)
      Notifies the listener about the change of a property of this model object.
      ModelObjectEvent AbstractModelObject.firePropertyChanged(String propertyName, Object oldValue, Object newValue)
      Notifies the listener about the change of a property of this model object.
      ModelObjectEvent ModelObjectEvent.getCause()
      Replies the cause of this event.
      Methods in org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism with parameters of type ModelObjectEvent 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      ModelObjectEvent ModelObject.fireContentChanged(ModelObjectEvent cause)
      Notifies the listener about the change of the content of this model object.
      ModelObjectEvent AbstractModelObject.fireContentChanged(ModelObjectEvent cause)
      Notifies the listener about the change of the content of this model object.
      void ModelObjectListener.modelComponentAdded(ModelObjectEvent event)
      Invoked each time a component was added.
      void ModelObjectAdapter.modelComponentAdded(ModelObjectEvent event)
      Invoked each time a component was added.
      void ModelObjectListener.modelComponentRemoved(ModelObjectEvent event)
      Invoked each time a component was removed.
      void ModelObjectAdapter.modelComponentRemoved(ModelObjectEvent event)
      Invoked each time a component was removed.
      void ModelObjectListener.modelContainerChanged(ModelObjectEvent event)
      Invoked each time the container of a model object has changed.
      void ModelObjectAdapter.modelContainerChanged(ModelObjectEvent event)
      Invoked each time the container of a model object has changed.
      void ModelObjectListener.modelContentChanged(ModelObjectEvent event)
      Invoked each time the content of a model object has changed.
      void ModelObjectAdapter.modelContentChanged(ModelObjectEvent event)
      Invoked each time the content of a model object has changed.
      void ModelObjectListener.modelLinkChanged(ModelObjectEvent event)
      Invoked each time the link to an other model object has changed.
      void ModelObjectAdapter.modelLinkChanged(ModelObjectEvent event)
      Invoked each time the link to an other model object has changed.
      void ModelObjectListener.modelPropertyChanged(ModelObjectEvent event)
      Invoked each time the property of a model has changed.
      void ModelObjectAdapter.modelPropertyChanged(ModelObjectEvent event)
      Invoked each time the property of a model has changed.

      ModelObjectEvent(ModelObject source, ModelObjectEvent cause)
